parsed.simulated_user_message: I think the only thing that has ever helped me feel a bit more authentic is when I used to write in a little notebook in the park, where nobody could see me and I could just be myself, but even that feels like a performance now. I'm not sure if that even counts as a win, because the anxiety about what others think still lingers. Maybe I should try that again, but I keep putting it off. It's part of the same life_transition I'm stuck in.
